title: Vault index
body: Landing page. Sections on sourcing, sequencing, judgment.

title: Absence as evidence
body: Cross-source absence beats single-source presence. Do not let the loudest surface set the truth.

title: Settlement date over reporting date
body: For custody-based assets, use settlement price feed. Name the policy the number rests on.

title: Related party red flags
body: Ownership overlap, residential addresses, PO boxes, and repeating round numbers deserve their own working folder.

title: Setaside discipline
body: The stale source is named. The trusted source is named. Both get filed together so the auditor can retrace the choice.

title: Writing findings that survive counsel
body: Conservative language. Facts before inference. Every number traces to a source line.

title: Programme outline
body: Three ninety minute sessions with breaks. Cases sanitized. No client names.

title: Module one sourcing hierarchy
body: Signed agreements over CRM live view. Board minutes over operational ledger. Custody statement over reporting cache.

title: Module two anomaly triangulation
body: Presence in one system alone is a question, not an answer.

title: Module three write up craft
body: Every claim carries a source ID. Every setaside is named.
